name: canvize
title: Canvize
description: Browse all repositories in the canvize GitHub organization
author: kevin

commands.name: canvize
commands.title: Canvize Repositories
commands.subtitle: canvize org
commands.description: List all repositories in the canvize GitHub organization

preferences.name: githubToken
preferences.title: GitHub Token
preferences.description: Optional. If empty, the extension uses your GitHub CLI auth (`gh auth token`) automatically. Set a personal access token here to override it. Needs 'repo' + 'read:org' scopes to see private repos.
